generated_assessment.reasoning: The exposure highlighted concrete consequences of weak alliance commitment, reinforcing my existing concern about national security vulnerabilities. The personal anecdote made it feel more urgent and real.

request_payload.exposure_text: 🚨 Just heard from a friend in the cybersecurity sector - our allies are holding back critical threat intelligence because they don't trust our commitment. Last year's cyberattack on our power grid started overseas, but our partners knew about the vulnerability months before. If we don't show we're serious about burden-sharing, who's going to warn us next time? #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
